title: Worker's compensation
doc_html:
§1542.  Worker's compensation

The state shall become self-insured for worker's compensation coverage by January 1, 1981.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 520, §1, eff. July 1, 1980.  Acts 1983, 1st Ex.Sess., No. 1, §6.
doc_text:
§1542.  Worker's compensation
The state shall become self-insured for worker's compensation coverage by January 1, 1981.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 520, §1, eff. July 1, 1980.  Acts 1983, 1st Ex.Sess., No. 1, §6.
